description: Port the new frontend-design/ (wireframe-kit.jsx + screens/) into the real Next.js app. Replace the just-merged fk-* frontend-kit with wk-* primitives, rebuild the app shell (left rail + top bar + user menu), rebuild Asset Register and the 9-tab Asset Detail (left rail), ship the Template library, and reskin Setup pages (AssetTypes/Spaces/Systems) to the new kit. Features without backend (AI surfaces, Dashboard, Documents/Drawings, Checklist execution, Framework artboard) are out of scope. Backendless Asset Detail tabs (Issues/Files/RFIs/History) render the visual design with a [design preview] badge from a shared JSON fixture. See ADR-0006 for the kit-replacement rationale.

userStories.title: Kit foundation — replace fk-* with wk-* primitives + Geist fonts
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need the new wireframe-kit primitives (WBox, WFrame, WH, WT, WLabel, WPill, WBtn, WSectionLabel, WLines, WNote, WLiveDot, WAI, WBrandHeading) implemented in TypeScript at frontend/src/lib/frontend-kit/ so every later screen has a working primitive layer. Replaces the prior fk-* implementation entirely.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete existing frontend/src/lib/frontend-kit/index.tsx and styles.css contents; rewrite from frontend-design/wireframe-kit.jsx
Implement WBox, WFrame, WH, WT, WLabel, WPill, WBtn, WSectionLabel, WLines, WNote, WLiveDot, WAI, WBrandHeading as typed React components

Define CSS variables --ui-bg, --ui-panel, --ui-panel-2, --ui-panel-3, --ui-ink, --ui-ink-soft, --ui-ink-faint, --ui-line, --ui-line-strong, --ui-ok, --ui-ok-soft, --ui-ok-line, --ui-warn, --ui-ai-line, --ui-shadow-accent on :root with light defaults
Load Geist Sans + Geist Mono via next/font/google and wire to font-family in styles.css
Visit /frontend-kit-preview and confirm primitives render with new fonts and tokens
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Theme + accent provider (light/dark, azure/cobalt/copper/emerald) backed by localStorage
userStories.description: As a user, I want to switch between light/dark themes and four accent colors from the user menu, and have the choice persist across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/lib/theme/ThemeProvider.tsx — context provides {theme, accent, setTheme, setAccent}
Persist to localStorage keys cxp.theme and cxp.accent; default {theme:'light', accent:'azure'}
Set data-theme and data-accent attributes on <html> on mount and on change
Add dark-theme CSS variable overrides in frontend-kit/styles.css under [data-theme='dark']
Add accent CSS variable overrides for [data-accent='azure'|'cobalt'|'copper'|'emerald'] (--ui-primary, --ui-primary-line, --ui-primary-soft)
Wrap app/layout.tsx with ThemeProvider
No flash of wrong theme on hard reload (read localStorage in an inline pre-hydration script)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: App shell — replace (app)/layout.tsx with left rail + top bar + user menu
userStories.description: As a user, I want the new global chrome (vertical left rail, top bar, top-right user menu dropdown) on every (app)/* route, so the app feels coherent with the design.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite frontend/src/app/(app)/layout.tsx using wk-* primitives
Left rail items in order: Assets, Checklists, Asset Types, Spaces, Systems; ghost (disabled) items: Issues, Drawings, Reports
Active rail item determined by current pathname
Top bar shows project name + phase when on a /project/[id] route

Top-right user-menu dropdown items: Organization (→/organization), Projects (→/projects), Team (→/project/[id]/members when in a project), Theme toggle (light/dark), Accent picker (4 swatches), Sign out
Existing routes /dashboard, /inbox, /entity/[id] remain accessible by URL but are NOT in the rail
Delete unused chrome remnants from the prior layout
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Design-preview mock fixtures for backendless Asset Detail tabs
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want a shared JSON fixture for Issues/Files/RFIs/History tab content so the Asset Detail page can render the new design without backend changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/contexts/asset_registry/_design_preview/issues.json with 4-6 mock punch/issue entries (id, title, severity, status, opened_at, owner_initials)
Create files.json with 4-6 mock documents (name, kind, size, uploaded_at)
Create rfis.json with 3-5 mock RFIs (number, subject, status, opened, due)
Create history.json with 8-12 audit-log entries (timestamp, actor_initials, action, target)
Add a frontend/src/contexts/asset_registry/_design_preview/index.ts barrel exporting typed loaders for each fixture
Add a top-of-file comment in the barrel: DESIGN PREVIEW — mocked; delete when backend ships
Typecheck passes
